name: Card
description: A container with header, body, and footer sections for grouping related content.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual variant controlling border, background, and elevation.

props.name: interactive
props.description: When true, the card is focusable and emits `kb-click` on activation.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for an interactive card (used as `aria-label` on the `role="button"` element).

props.name: href
props.description: URL to navigate to - renders the card as an anchor element.

props.name: target
props.description: Link target attribute, e.g. `'_blank'`. Only used when `href` is set.

events.name: kb-click
events.description: Dispatched when an interactive card is clicked or activated via keyboard.
